inputs.label: Lot Size
inputs.businessContext: Number of standard lots (1 lot = 100,000 units)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of standard lots (1 lot = 100,000 units)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de lots standard (1 lot = 100 000 unités)
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de lotes estándar (1 lote = 100,000 unidades)

inputs.label: Entry Price
inputs.businessContext: Exchange rate at which the position was entered

businessContext_i18n.en: Exchange rate at which the position was entered
businessContext_i18n.de: Wechselkurs, zu dem die Position eröffnet wurde
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de change auquel la position a été ouverte
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de cambio al que se ingresó la posición
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر الصرف الذي تم به فتح المركز

inputs.label: Exit Price
inputs.businessContext: Exchange rate at which the position was closed

businessContext_i18n.en: Exchange rate at which the position was closed
businessContext_i18n.de: Wechselkurs, zu dem die Position geschlossen wurde
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux de change auquel la position a été fermée
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de cambio al que se cerró la posición
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر الصرف الذي تم به إغلاق المركز

inputs.label: Pip Size
inputs.businessContext: Smallest price increment (e.g., 0.0001 for most pairs, 0.01 for JPY pairs)

businessContext_i18n.en: Smallest price increment (e.g., 0.0001 for most pairs, 0.01 for JPY pairs)
businessContext_i18n.tr: En küçük fiyat artışı (ör. çoğu parite için 0.0001, JPY pariteleri için 0.01)
businessContext_i18n.de: Kleinste Preisänderung (z. B. 0,0001 für die meisten Paare, 0,01 für JPY-Paare)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Plus petit incrément de prix (ex. 0,0001 pour la plupart des paires, 0,01 pour les paires JPY)
businessContext_i18n.es: Incremento de precio más pequeño (p. ej., 0.0001 para la mayoría de pares, 0.01 para pares JPY)
businessContext_i18n.ar: أصغر زيادة في السعر (مثل 0.0001 لمعظم الأزواج، 0.01 لأزواج الين)

inputs.label: Pip Value
inputs.unit: account currency per pip per lot
inputs.businessContext: Monetary value of one pip per standard lot in the account currency

businessContext_i18n.en: Monetary value of one pip per standard lot in the account currency
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hesap para biriminde standart lot başına bir pipin parasal değeri
businessContext_i18n.de: Geldwert eines Pips pro Standard-Lot in der Kontowährung
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur monétaire d'un pip par lot standard dans la devise du compte
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor monetario de un pip por lote estándar en la moneda de la cuenta
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة النقدية لنقطة واحدة لكل عقد قياسي بعملة الحساب

inputs.label: Leverage
inputs.businessContext: Leverage ratio provided by the broker (e.g., 100:1)

businessContext_i18n.en: Leverage ratio provided by the broker (e.g., 100:1)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Ratio de levier fourni par le courtier (ex. 100:1)
businessContext_i18n.es: Ratio de apalancamiento proporcionado por el bróker (p. ej., 100:1)
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة الرافعة المالية التي يوفرها الوسيط (مثل 100:1)
